title: GoHighLevel's Summer of AI: Every AI Tool Is Free Through August (Mind the Billing)
desc: GoHighLevel's Summer of AI gives every account free AI tools from June 1 to August 31, 2026. What is included, the billing catch, and how agencies use it.
keywords: gohighlevel summer of ai 2026, gohighlevel free ai tools, gohighlevel conversation ai, gohighlevel voice ai, gohighlevel ai pricing
cta: Want GoHighLevel AI set up and managed for you?
body:
June 11, 2026. GoHighLevel has switched on its biggest AI promotion of the year, and for agencies and small businesses that run on the platform it is a rare window to test paid features at no cost. The Summer of AI campaign runs from June 1 through August 31, 2026, and it changes the math on tools that normally meter every message and minute.

What is on the table

  1. Six AI tools free all summer. Ask AI, AI Studio, Workflow AI, Funnel AI, Email AI, and Forms AI are included for every account through August 31, with no usage charge during the promotion.
  2. A 30-day free trial on the metered agents. Conversation AI and Voice AI, the features that normally bill per message and per minute, get a free 30-day trial for accounts that have not used them in the prior 90 days.
  3. A monthly spotlight. GoHighLevel is featuring one tool per month: Conversation AI in June, Voice AI in July, and AI Studio in August, with education and templates around each.
  4. One catch to circle on the calendar. Each enrolled sub-account converts to pay-per-use billing at the then-current rates unless you cancel before the trial ends. Free now does not mean free in September.

What it means for operators

This is a low-risk way to find out whether conversational and voice agents actually move the needle for you before you pay for them. Turn the free tools on this month, point Conversation AI at a real inbound channel, missed-call text back, web chat, or lead follow-up, and measure booked appointments and response time against your baseline. The tools that earn their keep are easy to justify. The ones that do not, you cancel before the meter starts.

The discipline is in the billing. Conversation AI and Voice AI bill per use once the promotion ends, and costs scale with volume, so a tool that looks free in June can become a real line item in the fall if you forget to review it. Set a reminder a few days before each trial converts, decide tool by tool, and document which sub-accounts you enrolled.

For agencies managing many GoHighLevel sub-accounts, this is also a sales moment: pilot the agents on your own account first, build the workflows and prompts that work, then roll the proven setup to clients as a paid service. If you would rather not build it from scratch, our team does GoHighLevel setup and automation and can staff a GoHighLevel developer to wire Conversation AI, Voice AI, and workflows into your client accounts the right way.
faqs: When does GoHighLevel's Summer of AI run?
The campaign runs from June 1 through August 31, 2026, with a different AI feature spotlighted each month: Conversation AI in June, Voice AI in July, and AI Studio in August.
Which GoHighLevel AI tools are free this summer?

Ask AI, AI Studio, Workflow AI, Funnel AI, Email AI, and Forms AI are free for all accounts through August 31. Conversation AI and Voice AI get a free 30-day trial for accounts that have not used them in the prior 90 days.
What happens after the free trial ends?

Each enrolled sub-account converts to pay-per-use billing at GoHighLevel's then-current rates unless you cancel before the trial ends. Conversation AI and Voice AI bill per message and per minute, so costs scale with volume.
How should an agency use the promotion?

Pilot the agents on your own account, measure results like booked appointments and response time, then roll the proven workflows to clients as a paid service. Set a reminder before each trial converts so you choose tool by tool.
